title: Marketing-sourced deals close 14 days faster this week
anchor: Current week wins average 38 days to close versus 52 days over the prior 11 weeks.
body: Current week wins average 38 days to close versus 52 days over the prior 11 weeks. Mid-market represents 7 of 9 current-week wins.
trace: Current week marketing-sourced wins show 38.0 day mean close time versus 52.1 day prior 11-week average.

title: Mid-market SQLs up 50% in April
anchor: April mid-market SQLs hit 147 month-to-date versus a 98 monthly average in Q1.
connect: Q1 monthly progression ran Jan 95, Feb 98, Mar 101.
body: April mid-market SQLs hit 147 month-to-date versus a 98 monthly average in Q1. Q1 monthly progression ran Jan 95, Feb 98, Mar 101.
trace: April mid-market SQLs at 147 MTD show 50% increase over Q1 three-month average of 98.

title: Paid social overtakes paid search for pipeline creation
anchor: Q2 paid social generated $620K pipeline versus $380K from paid search.
connect: Q1 order reversed at $720K paid search and $410K paid social.
body: Q2 paid social generated $620K pipeline versus $380K from paid search. Q1 order reversed at $720K paid search and $410K paid social.
trace: Q2 paid social pipeline creation at $620K exceeded paid search at $380K, reversing Q1 pattern.

title: Branded search doubles over six weeks
anchor: Weekly branded search volume climbed from 1000 to 1921, posting gains in all six weeks.
connect: Cumulative growth over the window sits at 92.1%.
body: Weekly branded search volume climbed from 1000 to 1921, posting gains in all six weeks. Cumulative growth over the window sits at 92.1%.
trace: Six-week branded search streak shows week-over-week increases in all periods, 92.1% cumulative growth.

title: ABM SQLs convert at 61% versus 42% for general
anchor: April ABM acceptance rate runs at 61.4% on 70 MQLs.
connect: Non-ABM acceptance sits at 41.6% on 77 MQLs.
body: April ABM acceptance rate runs at 61.4% on 70 MQLs. Non-ABM acceptance sits at 41.6% on 77 MQLs.
trace: April ABM MQL-to-SQL acceptance at 61.4% outperforms non-ABM at 41.6%.

title: Enterprise win rate jumps to 31% in Q2
anchor: Q2 enterprise deals close at 30.77% win rate on 26 attempts.
connect: Trailing four quarters averaged 22.22% on 180 attempts.
body: Q2 enterprise deals close at 30.77% win rate on 26 attempts. Trailing four quarters averaged 22.22% on 180 attempts.
trace: Q2 enterprise win rate at 30.77% exceeds trailing four quarter average of 22.22%.

title: Direct traffic crosses organic search in April
anchor: April traffic split shows direct at 42.2% versus organic search at 36.5%.
connect: Direct first overtook organic on a cumulative basis April 15.
body: April traffic split shows direct at 42.2% versus organic search at 36.5%. Direct first overtook organic on a cumulative basis April 15.
trace: April traffic composition shows direct at 42.2% surpassing organic search at 36.5%, crossover occurred April 15.

title: Event sourced deals close 24 days faster than prior quarter
anchor: Q1 event-sourced wins averaged 45.5 days to close across 18 deals.
connect: Q4 2025 event wins took 69.2 days on 15 deals.
body: Q1 event-sourced wins averaged 45.5 days to close across 18 deals. Q4 2025 event wins took 69.2 days on 15 deals.
trace: Q1 event-sourced deal velocity at 45.5 days improved from Q4 2025 at 69.2 days.

title: Brand mentions lead competitor by 52% in April
anchor: Atlas SaaS mentions hit 1840 through April 24.
connect: Top competitor Beacon Systems recorded 1210 mentions over the same period.
body: Atlas SaaS mentions hit 1840 through April 24. Top competitor Beacon Systems recorded 1210 mentions over the same period.
trace: April Atlas SaaS brand mentions at 1840 exceed top competitor Beacon Systems at 1210.

title: Analyst coverage accelerates in past two weeks
anchor: Last 14 days generated 9 analyst mentions versus 6 in the prior 30 days.
connect: Forrester and G2 each contributed 3 mentions in the recent window.
body: Last 14 days generated 9 analyst mentions versus 6 in the prior 30 days. Forrester and G2 each contributed 3 mentions in the recent window.
trace: Analyst mention acceleration shows 9 mentions in last 14 days versus 6 in prior 30-day period.

title: Q2 digital spend runs $84K under plan
anchor: Actual spend through April 23 sits at $256K versus $340K planned.
connect: Two event reallocations freed up the gap amount.
body: Actual spend through April 23 sits at $256K versus $340K planned. Two event reallocations freed up the gap amount.
trace: Q2 digital ads actual spend at $256K versus $340K planned, with $84K reallocated from events.

title: Atlas Assist launch locks calendar this Thursday
anchor: Product launch scheduled for May 8 with campaign status ready.
body: Product launch scheduled for May 8 with campaign status ready. Calendar locks April 24.
trace: Atlas Assist launch on May 8 shows campaign ready status with calendar lock date April 24.

title: SDR capacity absorption drops to 68% this week
anchor: Current week inbound volume at 142 versus SDR capacity of 210.
connect: Trailing four weeks averaged 95% absorption at 194 volume versus 204 capacity.
body: Current week inbound volume at 142 versus SDR capacity of 210. Trailing four weeks averaged 95% absorption at 194 volume versus 204 capacity.
trace: Current week SDR capacity utilization at 68% (142/210) versus trailing 4-week average of 95%.

title: Target accounts show 60% intent acceleration

connect: Two of the three sit on the Named Accounts list of 50.
body: Three target accounts posted 5+ high-intent events this week. Two of the three sit on the Named Accounts list of 50.
trace: Current week shows 3 target accounts with 5+ high-intent events, 2 of which are on Named Accounts list.

trace: Recent 60-day mid-market wins show 10 of 13 from fintech vertical, all 13 running Snowflake plus dbt.

body: SaaS Connect contributed all 18 event-sourced wins in Q1. Event pipeline averaged 45.5 days to close versus 52 days for general marketing-sourced.
